_note: Single source of truth for creatures. Spawner reads tier/hp/spawn/drops; bestiary UI reads dex.*. Kill/capture tracking lives in state.bestiary = { <id>: { kills, seen } }. Locked ??? box until seen=true (first defeat/capture); then kill count shows and each dex.reveal.<field> is a kill threshold that unlocks that block. Keys starting with _ are ignored by the loader (only 'creatures' and 'resources' are read), so _archived holds retired creatures without deleting them. Optional per-entry fields: 'sprite' = PNG path that overrides the built-in pixel art (drop the file in + reload; a missing file falls back to the drawn art, a harmless 404 until you add it), 'spriteSize' = draw px, 'enabled': false = shelve a creature (out of spawning + bestiary). Resources support the same 'sprite'/'spriteSize' override for their dropped-material icon.

dex.description: A gelatinous cube of congealed, unwritten ideas. It doesn't bite — it just wobbles toward you and pins you against it.
dex.lore: Every writer meets one eventually. Break it down and it yields something useful — usually cheese, occasionally glue. Nobody asks why cheese.

dex.description: A lumbering heap of rejected manuscripts held together by nothing but rejection. It sheds loose pages as it shuffles — the easiest bulk paper in the library.
dex.lore: Every 'we regret to inform you' ends up here. Somewhere in the pile is a masterpiece. It is not this one.

dex.description: A giggling imp that darts in to smudge your work. Touch it and it swaps one letter you're carrying for a random other — annoying, not deadly. Drops graphite and the odd blank tile.
dex.lore: It lives for the moment you spell 'the' as 'teh'. It has never once felt shame.

dex.description: A slow blob of spilled-coffee stain (yes, mugwump is a real word). It oozes along leaving slippery rings that skid you off course, and sheds the sticky paste it's made of.
dex.lore: It haunts you with all the coffee rings you failed to prevent.

dex.description: A scuttling pest that pries books off their spines. Cowardly and quick, but crack it open and it gives up the thread and glue it was busy stealing.
dex.lore: It has no backbone, and takes yours personally.

dex.description: A living ember named for the enemy of every printed page. It spreads fire as it drifts and will scorch loot left on the ground — grab your drops fast.
dex.lore: Its name is the cruelest joke in the library. It burns wax hot enough to seal a cover, if you dare collect it.

dex.silhouette: a roaming tear in the page
dex.description: A tear in the page where the story stopped making sense. It drags everything nearby toward its center — including you. Fall in and you lose a heart. Rarely coughs up a blank wildcard tile.
dex.lore: 'And then they woke up, and it was all a dream.' This is where that sentence goes to live.

dex.description: A wraith of red editorial ink wielding a pen like a scythe. It strikes lines through anything it passes and takes a lot to put down — but its red ink is a prize worth the fight.
dex.lore: It marks every mistake you've ever made. The margins run red. It is never, ever satisfied.

dex.description: A shambling, stamp-covered library book that never went home. Slow and tough, but it carries the richest haul — leather and a stack of pages.
dex.lore: Return date: long past. It roams the stacks, heavy with guilt and good materials.

spawn.note: Not part of the resource-creature pool; spawned by letterScatter + WOTD guarantee (see CLAUDE.md). Weight 0 keeps it out of this roll.

dex.description: The prize catch. A living letter, skittish and quick to flee. Capture one to add its letter to your satchel — the raw material of every word you'll spell.
dex.lore: Escaped from the books when the words came loose. Round them up to set the stories right.

dex.description: A plump grub that tunnels through pages, leaving little round holes.
dex.lore: The original enemy of books, and the reason the whole genre is named after it.

dex.description: A pale moth that loops unpredictably, nibbling the cloth and thread of bindings.
dex.lore: Drawn to lamplight and old spines.

dex.description: A quick, wingless pest that bolts for cover the instant you approach.
dex.lore: It eats the glue right out of the spine.

dex.description: Half eraser, half razor. It lunges to rub out a letter you're carrying.
dex.lore: It doesn't want to hurt you. It wants to un-write you.
